result.reason: The user requests to hide MultiSSH related UI elements. This will be addressed by introducing a setting to control the visibility of 'Include in Multi SSH' and 'Exclude from Multi SSH' context menu items.
result.approach: Add a new user setting to control the visibility of the 'Include in Multi SSH' and 'Exclude from Multi SSH' context menu items. Modify ConnectionWindow.cs to respect this new setting when displaying the context menu for PuTTY connections.
